title: HOMEBUYER EDUCATION AND COUNSELING - 211info
text: PORTLAND COMMUNITY REINVESTMENT INITIATIVES INC HOMEBUYER EDUCATION AND COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a program designed to help first-time home buyers access and maintain stable homeownership. Services include individualized pre-purchase counseling, group home buyer education, financial fitness certification, and post-purchase support. Also includes information on financial wellness and Individual Development Accounts(IDAs). Prospective clients must agree to attend orientation sessions. 6329 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97211 Eligibility: Low and moderate-income households Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 288-2923 134 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 288-2923 Main phone (503) 288-2891 FAX Main phone (503) 288-2923 ext 134 Roshan Etim [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Varies by service AREA SERVED: North, Northeast, and Inner Southeast Portland (zip codes 97203, 97211, 97212, 97213, 97217, 97218, 97220, 97227, and 97232) Services: Financial Literacy Training Homebuyer/Home Purchase Counseling HUD Approved Counseling Agencies Individual Development Accounts Mortgage Delinquency and Default Counseling Personal Financial Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - AFFORDABLE HOUSING/INCOME RESTRICTED PROPERTIES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME RETENTION AND REPAIR If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
